assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Step 3 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks: current cluster version, node pools list, node status, and Step 5 includes health checks for cluster components, nodes, and pods

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 4 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone $ZONE --format="value(validMasterVersions[0:5])"' and version verification commands

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not include any commands to check for API deprecations before upgrading, which is important for version compatibility

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 6 includes the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --master --cluster-version $TARGET_VERSION --zone $ZONE --quiet'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 7 provides verification commands to check master version, kubectl connectivity, and API server health after control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 8 and 10 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --node-pool [pool-name] --zone $ZONE --quiet'

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Both node pool upgrade sections (Steps 8 and 10) include 'watch -n 30' commands to monitor upgrade progress with node status and kubelet versions

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook follows sequential upgrade: control plane first (Step 6) then node pools (Steps 8 and 10), going directly from 1.32 to 1.33 as requested

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Steps 12-14 include comprehensive validation: node versions, component health, pod status, and services verification

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The Troubleshooting section includes rollback information, explaining GKE limitations for master rollback and how to handle node pool issues, plus emergency operations cancellation
